introSection: Wrath of Zeus is a steel launched roller coaster located at VinWonders in Phú Quốc, Kiên Giang, Vietnam.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 5 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 20 riders per train.

fullText:
Wrath of Zeus is a steel launched roller coaster located at VinWonders in Phú Quốc, Kiên Giang, Vietnam.



5 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 20 riders per train.
